risk_if_not_implemented: Without Personal Data (PD) Lineage, personal data may be processed without appropriate safeguards, increasing regulatory and reputational risk.

compensating_control_1.name: Information Location
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to identify and document the location of information and the specific system components on which the information resides.
compensating_control_1.justification: Information Location (DCH-24) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Personal Data (PD) Lineage (PRI-09) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Asset Inventories
compensating_control_2.justification: Asset Inventories (AST-02) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Personal Data (PD) Lineage (PRI-09) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
